title: trisetum striatum
intro: Trisetum striatum, also known as striate hair-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum striatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
